content: agent2: implementing ConditionalI18nExtension (ctrans tag) in src/jinja2/ext.py. Will be adding new class + module alias 'conditional_i18n'. Will try to minimize diff surface / avoid touching unrelated parts of ext.py. Let me know what you're touching there.

agent2: ack, thanks. I'm adding a new class ConditionalI18nExtension (ctrans tag) with its own parse()/_parse_block()/_trim_whitespace()/_make_conditional_node() methods (independent of InternationalizationExtension, not modifying it). Will append the class near the end of ext.py, plus module alias 'conditional_i18n = ConditionalI18nExtension' near the other aliases at the bottom. Should not conflict with your trans/context changes.
